2 Feature Engineering & Disruption Labeling

3 Text Encoder (ProsusAI/FinBERT)

Encoder Architecture

Capturing lexical disruption signals via financial domain-specific BERT.

768 → 64Projection
FrozenBackbone
0.5817Class Centroid Sim

Method: Structured synthesis used to activate BERT's pre-trained attention heads.

Synthetic Text Samples

Generating natural language from structured logistics records.

A sea shipment of Auto Parts goods departed from Hamburg, DE bound for New York, US via the Atlantic route. The shipment was scheduled for 15 days and was delivered exactly on schedule. Delivery status: On Time. Severe weather conditions impacted transit. Geopolitical risk index: 0.47. Weather severity index: 10.0. Inflation rate: 4.66%. Shipping cost: USD 5,873. Cargo weight: 7991 kg. Mitigation action: Standard Shipping.

A sea shipment of Consumer Electronics goods departed from Santos, BR bound for Shanghai, CN via the Commodity route. The shipment was scheduled for 38 days and was delivered exactly on schedule. Delivery status: On Time. Severe weather conditions impacted transit. Geopolitical risk index: 0.25. Weather severity index: 6.7. Inflation rate: 5.73%. Shipping cost: USD 913. Cargo weight: 1461 kg. Mitigation action: Standard Shipping.

A sea shipment of Perishable Foods goods departed from Tokyo, JP bound for Singapore, SG via the Intra-Asia route. The shipment was scheduled for 10 days and was delivered exactly on schedule. Delivery status: On Time. A disruption event was recorded: Port Congestion. Geopolitical risk is elevated in this corridor. Geopolitical risk index: 0.66. Weather severity index: 3.1. Inflation rate: 3.08%. Shipping cost: USD 2,097. Cargo weight: 2297 kg. Mitigation action: Standard Shipping.

A sea shipment of Perishable Foods goods departed from Tokyo, JP bound for Singapore, SG via the Intra-Asia route. The shipment was scheduled for 8 days and was delivered exactly on schedule. Delivery status: On Time. Geopolitical risk is elevated in this corridor. Geopolitical risk index: 0.73. Weather severity index: 2.3. Inflation rate: 3.24%. Shipping cost: USD 357. Cargo weight: 413 kg. Mitigation action: Standard Shipping.

A air shipment of Pharmaceuticals goods departed from Tokyo, JP bound for Singapore, SG via the Intra-Asia route. The shipment was scheduled for 5 days and was delivered exactly on schedule. Delivery status: On Time. Geopolitical risk index: 0.60. Weather severity index: 0.7. Inflation rate: 4.58%. Shipping cost: USD 66,994. Cargo weight: 7613 kg. Mitigation action: Standard Shipping.
